title: OCS/GCS qstat schema
description: Root schema for the JSON produced by qstat -fmt json. qstat emits one of several output shapes depending on its mode: the default (and -ext, -urg) output, the full output (-f), the cluster queue summary (-g c) and the job detail output (-j). The concrete shape is identified by the document's '$id' member, which points at the matching per-mode schema. Each branch below selects a shape by its '$id' and validates the document against that shape's schema.
